playbook.intent: Friday-clear backlog: top 3 outcomes for the week chosen, single-tasked file/board updated, no-go items deferred, Monday-morning first task primed with prompt + acceptance.
playbook.scope: Friday-clear backlog: top 3 outcomes for the week chosen, single-tasked file/board updated, no-go items deferred, Monday-morning first task primed with prompt + acceptance.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Inbox + backlog sweep
stage.intent: Clear the noise so signal is visible.

tasks.task: Triage inbox and tracker into one place
Drop everything older than 30 days that nobody has chased

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when inbox is empty and backlog has <=20 active items.

stage.name: Pick top 3 outcomes
stage.intent: Force ranking. Three or fewer outcomes per week.

tasks.task: Commit to the top 3 with explicit non-goals

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with exactly 3 named outcomes. No and also.

stage.name: Prime Monday
stage.intent: Remove all friction from Monday morning startup.

tasks.task: Open the first task file with prompt + acceptance criteria
Cue any external dependencies (data pulls, replies awaited)
Set the calendar block for first deep work session

stage.decision-gate: Advance when first task can start without any look-up at 9am Monday.

stage.name: Deferred & dropped log
stage.intent: Make trade-offs visible so they do not haunt.

tasks.task: Move non-top-3 candidates to backlog or dropped
Note the why for each defer
Set a re-evaluation date if relevant

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every candidate has a written disposition.

stage.name: Friday-clear handshake
stage.intent: Promise yourself the week ends on Friday.

tasks.task: Set a Friday checkpoint slot on the calendar
List the acceptance criteria for this week is shipped
Pre-commit to no work on Saturday unless emergency

stage.decision-gate: Closes when the ritual file is saved and dated.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content sunday-roadmap-week-shaping-ritual --format md, agent: faion get-content sunday-roadmap-week-shaping-ritual --format context, json: faion get-content sunday-roadmap-week-shaping-ritual --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
